title: Asial World
intro: Use Arrow keys / WASD to walk, or click the ground to move. Walk up to a building and press E (or click it) to explore. Press Esc to close a panel.

pois.title: Welcome to Asial
pages: Asial Corporation — a Tokyo-based technology company founded in 2002.
Led by Representative Director Masahiro Tanaka (田中正裕).
Brands itself as a "Digital Empowerment Company": using IT to make people and society more prosperous — from backend systems to frontend and UI/UX design.
Walk around and visit each building to explore. Try the Solutions plaza, the Products lab, the Track Record gallery, Company info, and Careers.

pois.title: Why Choose Us (選ばれる理由)
pages: A full-stack specialist team.
Members hold the complete skill set — from requirements definition through UI/UX design.
This lets complex client challenges be solved in a single engagement, and high-value proprietary products to be built in-house.

pois.title: Solutions (ソリューション)
pages: 8 service areas:
1. System Consulting — 20+ years of development expertise across industries.
2. DX / In-house Development Support — hands-on technical guidance to promote DX.
3. System Construction & App Development — web and mobile apps with modern tech.
4. AI System Development & R&D — data analysis, PoC, and AI-integrated UI/UX.
5. UX/UI Design — multi-platform design, designer + developer collaboration.
6. University DX Support — DX solutions for higher-education operations.
7. Information Education — promoting technology literacy since founding (2002).
8. Products — Monaca, Onsen UI, and other development tools.

pois.title: Products (プロダクト)
pages: 7 products:
Monaca — cloud-based hybrid mobile app dev platform (web standards).
Monaca Education — programming education for schools (JS/Python, build real apps).
Monaca for Hybridcast — HTML5 content tooling for next-gen "Hybridcast" TV.
Onsen UI — open-source mobile UI framework (100+ components, React/Vue).
MyCampus — university DX app (digital student ID, attendance, campus services).
ObjectiveFS — S3-backed unlimited, NFS-compatible cloud storage.
JpGraph — PHP graphing library (20+ chart types).

pois.title: Track Record (実績)
pages: 37+ client case studies across industries.
Finance: PayPay Bank (net banking app), Monex Securities, SMBC Financial Group.
Healthcare/Wellness: Suntory (gut-health app from audio analysis), Tanita (Health Planet).
Sports/Manufacturing: ASICS (shoe finder, gait analysis), Casio (Runmetrix/Walkmetrix).
Media/Entertainment: TV Asahi (「みんながカメラマン」), Sega (Puyo Puyo education).
Education/Research: Yamato University, Tokyo Univ. Kavli IPMU, Doshisha High School.
DX: Benesse i-Career (Cordova → Flutter migration), automotive CMS.

pois.title: Company Info (会社情報)
pages: Founded: 2002.
Representative Director: Masahiro Tanaka (田中正裕).
An "expert group" using information technology to enrich people and companies.
Vision: deliver technology to people and society worldwide and contribute to creative activities.

pois.title: Careers (採用情報)
pages: Roles in Project Management, Design, and Engineering.
Individualized growth paths rather than fixed career ladders.
Emphasis on the collective capability of the workforce (「働く人の総合力」).
Resources: member interviews, tech blog, internal note publications, casual interviews.

pois.title: Contact (お問い合わせ)
pages: Want to work with Asial?
Visit https://www.asial.co.jp/contact/ to get in touch.
Global / English site: https://en.asial.co.jp/
